findings.workflow_sequence: propose -> peer_review -> improve -> consensus -> broadcast -> adopt
findings.monitor_integration: bin/stampede-monitor.sh print_collab_summary() reads collab/ JSONL files and displays aggregate metrics

evidence: stampede.sh creates collab/ dir with 5 JSONL ledgers and protocol.json in metaswarm mode (lines 649-707)
Commander prompts receive STAMPEDE_COLLAB_* env vars (lines 909-915)
Monitor reads collab/ and displays aggregate metrics via print_collab_summary()
Live run shows active ledger entries: 4 proposals, 3 reviews, 5 improvements, 3 consensus, 0 broadcasts
SKILL.md and stampede-commander.agent.md contain no explicit collab-bus references - implementation lives in shell scripts only
Collab infrastructure is exclusive to metaswarm mode; regular stampede runs do not create it
summary: Collaboration bus confirmed: implemented in stampede.sh (metaswarm mode), consumed by monitor, active in live run with 15 ledger entries across 4 of 5 stages. Not referenced in SKILL.md or commander agent markdown - purely shell-script infrastructure.
